first_run.rationale: The scores are identical (3/10), and the reasoning across the justification, strengths, and concerns sections is substantively the same. Both evaluations correctly identify the candidate as a strong individual contributor who lacks the specific executive leadership, team scaling, and production system experience required for the CTO role. The minor differences in phrasing are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in the assessment of the candidate's qualifications based on the change in job location.
